label: Recent Trades
description: Live feed of recent prediction market fills with market, venue, side, price, and shares.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.7.note: LiveFeedWidget renders emptyMessage='No recent fills yet'.

1.3.note: recentFills is a user-action-driven list — not org-scoped (internal trader fills).

1.5.note: Strategy filter N/A — fills are action-driven, not strategy-filtered.

1.7.note: MOCK_RECENT_FILLS in context (lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data.ts) — widget file clean.

3.1.note: Live ✓ / paper ✓ (fills from simulated trades appear) / batch ✓ (historical fills, no live append).

3.2.note: Context reads isBatch; in batch mode placeTrade should not fire — fills list static.

3.5.note: Paper: fills appear from placeTrade in paper mode (mock order).

3.6.note: useLiveFeed(recentFills, 500) — 500ms scroll animation. Not a data-fetch interval, just UI animation; acceptable in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: verify fills appear after trade placement; 3.3/3.4 N/A (read-only feed).

4.1.note: No interactive buttons — pure display feed.

l4.notes: Human: 4.8 — feed scrolls within widget bounds; new fills prepend correctly.

5.1.note: Confirmation feed for all prediction strategies. Fills appear after pred-trade-panel placeTrade and pred-arb-stream executeArb actions.

l5.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: confirm fill appears in feed immediately after trade placement.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb in widget file. text-emerald-400/text-red-400 are Tailwind tokens, pass L7.1 scope.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.4.note: Agent: no bare img/input/div-onClick. Human: keyboard scroll through fills.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred. Human: 8.4 keyboard + 8.5 resize at minW=3.

keepSeparate.rationale: Fill feed is a distinct confirmation stream — not coupled to market selection or position state.

relationships.notes: Downstream of pred-trade-panel (placeTrade) and pred-arb-stream (executeArb); fills prepend to recentFills in context.

dataContract.notes: Production: WebSocket push on fill events from execution service. useLiveFeed animates display.

gaps: No pagination; oldest fills dropped silently by useLiveFeed cap
Arb fills (2-leg) appear as individual fills not grouped

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: pred-recent-fills-widget.tsx — text-[10px] and text-[9px] arbitrary font sizes for compact feed row info
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px) and text-nano (9px) tokens from globals.css (2026-04-21).
